mapper.insert: insert into spring1comment2 (bno, comment, writer, pass, secret) values ( #{bno}, #{comment}, #{writer}, #{pass}, #{secret} )
mapper.select: select pass from spring1comment2 where cno = #{cno}
select * from spring1comment2 where bno = #{bno} order by cno asc
mapper.update: update spring1comment2 set comment = #{comment} where cno = #{cno}
